summary: Implemented a docs-scoped goal-task relay runner that enforces shopops-goal task paths, exact task_pack_id freshness, result JSON plus HANDOFF validation, one-at-a-time worker selection, and durable repair queue output. Verified in dry-run mode only because this user request explicitly limited execution to T00.

evidence.claim: Relay runner maps T01-T13 to docs/auto-execute/shopops-goal-tasks, rejects stale result JSON without task_pack_id shopops-goal-2026-06-03, selects only the first open task, and writes repair-queue.md.
Dry-run validated 13 downstream tasks, selected T01 as first open task, and did not launch downstream codex exec workers.
Durable repair queue records stale or missing downstream artifacts for the current task pack.
T00 handoff records status, evidence, selected next task, limitations, and resume instructions.

limitations.reason: The user explicitly requested execution of only T00, so the relay runner was tested with -DryRun and did not spawn T01 or any later task.
Existing T01-T09/T11 result JSON files lack task_pack_id shopops-goal-2026-06-03 and cannot be used as current completion evidence.
T10, T12, and T13 currently lack required result JSON and HANDOFF artifacts for this task pack.

next_actions: Run docs/auto-execute/T00-run-goal-task-relay.ps1 without -DryRun only when the boundary expands from T00-only to executing downstream tasks.
First downstream task selected by current freshness rules is T01.
